chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1432 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6054/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 14.12.2023 Mr. Abdul Salam Shaikh, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ali Ansari, Advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioners does not press this petition having become infructuous. Accordingly, in above terms, the petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
